tasks.label: check-env-file
tasks.command: test -f .env || (cp .env.example .env && echo '⚠  已生成 .env，请先编辑填写 DOCKER_HUB_USER 等配置' && exit 1)

tasks.label: Docker: Build
tasks.command: set -a && source .env && set +a && IMAGE_TAG=${IMAGE_TAG:-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M)} && echo "$IMAGE_TAG" > /tmp/.rz_radar_last_tag && echo "🔨 Building ${DOCKER_HUB_USER}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}" && docker compose --project-directory . -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.build.yml build --progress=plain

tasks.label: Docker: Push
tasks.command: set -a && source .env && set +a && IMAGE_TAG=${IMAGE_TAG:-$(cat /tmp/.rz_radar_last_tag 2>/dev/null)} && if [ -z "$IMAGE_TAG" ]; then echo '❌ 找不到上次构建的 tag，请先运行 Docker: Build' && exit 1; fi && docker push ${DOCKER_HUB_USER}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG} && echo "✅ Pushed ${DOCKER_HUB_USER}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"

tasks.label: Docker: Build & Push
tasks.command: set -a && source .env && set +a && IMAGE_TAG=${IMAGE_TAG:-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M)} && echo "$IMAGE_TAG" > /tmp/.rz_radar_last_tag && echo "🔨 Building ${DOCKER_HUB_USER}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}" && docker compose --project-directory . -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.build.yml build --progress=plain && docker push ${DOCKER_HUB_USER}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG} && echo "✅ Pushed  ${DOCKER_HUB_USER}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"

tasks.label: Docker: Run Dev
tasks.command: set -a && source .env && set +a && IMAGE_TAG=${IMAGE_TAG:-latest} && xhost +local:docker 2>/dev/null; docker compose --project-directory . -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.dev.yml up

tasks.label: Docker: Run Prod
tasks.command: set -a && source .env && set +a && IMAGE_TAG=${IMAGE_TAG:-latest} && xhost +local:docker 2>/dev/null; docker compose --project-directory . -f docker/compose.yml up
